benefits.description: Lost approximately 41.6+ lbs over 3 months, going from 182+ lbs to 140.4 lbs
Slowed digestion making her feel fuller longer, putting her in a more intense caloric deficit; also encouraged better eating habits

side_effects.description: First two injections at each new dose level made her feel tired
Felt nauseous if she ate too much the day after injecting at higher doses

protocol_notes: Titration: 2.5mg once weekly for 4 weeks, then 5mg once weekly for 4 weeks, then 7.5mg once weekly. Total cycle approximately 3 months. Currently tapering off: took 7.5mg last week, 5mg current week, to avoid digestive disruption. Previously tried losing weight without tirzepatide without success. Also previously used liraglutide (mentioned in context of a commenter's question, not OP's history).
